description: Enter a startup idea and get a structured breakdown using the Minimalist Entrepreneur framework: who are your 1,000 true fans, what community to build in, what is the smallest viable product, and what revenue model to use. Clean card-based UI with shareable results via URL.
features: Idea input with example prompts for inspiration
Minimalist Entrepreneur framework analysis (true fans, community, MVP, revenue)
Verdict score ring (0-100) with Strong/Viable/Risky/Avoid labels
1,000 True Fans breakdown: profile, pain point, where to find, willingness to pay
Community strategy: platform recommendation, existing communities, build strategy
Smallest Viable Product: core solution, build-this-first features, skip-for-now list, tech stack
Revenue model: pricing strategy, path to $10K MRR, alternatives to explore
Shareable results via URL query parameter
